name: Liquidation
shortDescEn: 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
descEn: Has a 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 20%で相手の防御を1段階下げる。
descJa: 20%の確率で相手の防御ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Lock-On
shortDescEn: User's next move will not miss the target.
descEn: Until the end of the next turn, the target cannot avoid the user's moves, even if the target is in the middle of a two-turn move. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field. Fails if this effect is active for the user.
shortDescJa: 次の自分の技が必中になる。
descJa: 次のターンの終わりまで、相手は自分の技を回避できなくなる。

name: Low Kick
shortDescEn: More power the heavier the target.
descEn: This move's power is 20 if the target weighs less than 10 kg, 40 if less than 25 kg, 60 if less than 50 kg, 80 if less than 100 kg, 100 if less than 200 kg, and 120 if greater than or equal to 200 kg.
shortDescJa: 相手が重いほど威力が上がる。
descJa: 相手の体重が重いほど威力が上がる（威力20〜120）。

name: Low Sweep
shortDescEn: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 100%で相手の素早さを1段階下げる。
descJa: 100%の確率で相手の素早さランクを1段階下げる。

name: Lumina Crash
shortDescEn: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 2.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.
shortDescJa: 100%で相手の特防を2段階下げる。
descJa: 100%の確率で相手の特防ランクを2段階下げる。

name: Lunge
shortDescEn: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 100%で相手の攻撃を1段階下げる。
descJa: 100%の確率で相手の攻撃ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Mach Punch
shortDescEn: Usually goes first.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 先制攻撃を行う。
descJa: 優先度+1の先制技。

name: Magic Powder
shortDescEn: Changes the target's type to Psychic.
descEn: Causes the target to become a Psychic type. Fails if the target is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the target is already purely Psychic type, or if the target is Terastallized.
shortDescJa: 相手をエスパータイプに変える。
descJa: 相手のタイプをエスパータイプに変える。

name: Magic Room
shortDescEn: For 5 turns, all held items have no effect.
descEn: For 5 turns, the held items of all active Pokemon have no effect. An item's effect of causing forme changes is unaffected, but any other effects from such items are negated. During the effect, Fling and Natural Gift are prevented from being used by all active Pokemon. If this move is used during the effect, the effect ends.
shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、持ち物の効果を消す。
descJa: 5ターンの間、場にいるすべてのポケモンの持ち物の効果を無効化する。

name: Magnetic Flux
shortDescEn: Raises Def, Sp. Def of allies with Plus/Minus by 1.
descEn: Raises the Defense and Special Defense of Pokemon on the user's side with the Plus or Minus Abilities by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: プラス・マイナスの味方の防御・特防を1段階上げる。
descJa: 特性「プラス」または「マイナス」を持つ味方の防御・特防ランクを1段階上げる。

name: Magnet Rise
shortDescEn: For 5 turns, the user has immunity to Ground.
descEn: For 5 turns, the user is immune to Ground-type attacks and the effects of Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability as long as it remains active. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will gain the effect. Ingrain, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, and Iron Ball override this move if the user is under any of their effects. Fails if the user is already under this effect or the effects of Ingrain, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.
shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、地面技を無効化。
descJa: 5ターンの間、地面技や設置技を無効にする（浮遊状態になる）。

name: Matcha Gotcha
shortDescEn: 20% burn. Recovers 50% dmg dealt. Thaws foe(s).
descEn: Has a 20% chance to burn the target. The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. The target thaws out if it is frozen.
shortDescJa: 20%で火傷。与えたダメージの50%回復。
descJa: 20%の確率で「やけど」状態にし、与えたダメージの1/2を回復する。相手が凍っていたら溶かす。

name: Mean Look
shortDescEn: Prevents the target from switching out.
descEn: Prevents the target from switching out. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field.
shortDescJa: 相手を逃げられなくする。
descJa: 相手を交代できなくする。

name: Megahorn
shortDescEn: No additional effect.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

name: Mega Kick
shortDescEn: No additional effect.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

name: Memento
shortDescEn: Lowers target's Attack, Sp. Atk by 2. User faints.
descEn: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages. The user faints unless this move misses or there is no target. Fails entirely if this move hits a substitute, but does not fail if the target's stats cannot be changed.
shortDescJa: 相手の攻撃・特攻を2段階下げ、自分は倒れる。
descJa: 相手の攻撃・特攻ランクを2段階ずつ下げ、自分はひんし状態になる。

name: Metal Burst
shortDescEn: If hit by an attack, returns 1.5x damage.
descEn: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a physical or special attack this turn equal to 1.5 times the HP lost by the user from that attack, rounded down. If the user did not lose HP from that attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's physical or special attack this turn.
shortDescJa: 受けたダメージを1.5倍にして返す。
descJa: このターンに受けたダメージの1.5倍を相手に返す。

name: Metal Sound
shortDescEn: Lowers the target's Sp. Def by 2.
descEn: Lowers the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.
shortDescJa: 相手の特防を2段階下げる。
descJa: 相手の特防ランクを2段階下げる。

name: Meteor Beam
shortDescEn: Raises user's Sp. Atk by 1 on turn 1. Hits turn 2.
descEn: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Raises the user's Special Attack by 1 stage on the first turn. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
shortDescJa: 1ターン目に特攻を上げ、2ターン目に攻撃。
descJa: 1ターン目に特攻ランクを1段階上げ、2ターン目に攻撃する。

name: Meteor Mash
shortDescEn: 20% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1.
descEn: Has a 20% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 20%で自分の攻撃が1段階上がる。
descJa: 20%の確率で自分の攻撃ランクが1段階上がる。

name: Milk Drink
shortDescEn: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
descEn: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.
shortDescJa: 最大HPの50%回復。
descJa: 最大HPの1/2を回復する。

name: Minimize
shortDescEn: Raises the user's evasiveness by 2.
descEn: Raises the user's evasiveness by 2 stages. Whether or not the user's evasiveness was changed, Body Slam, Dragon Rush, Flying Press, Heat Crash, Heavy Slam, Malicious Moonsault, Steamroller, Stomp, and Supercell Slam will not check accuracy and have their damage doubled if used against the user while it is active.
shortDescJa: 自分の回避率を2段階上げる。
descJa: 自分の回避率ランクを2段階上げる。

name: Mirror Coat
shortDescEn: If hit by special attack, returns double damage.
descEn: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a special attack this turn equal to twice the HP lost by the user from that attack. If the user did not lose HP from the attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's special attack this turn.
shortDescJa: 受けた特殊ダメージを2倍にして返す。
descJa: このターンに受けた特殊技のダメージの2倍を相手に返す。

name: Misty Explosion
shortDescEn: User faints. User on Misty Terrain: 1.5x power.
descEn: If the current terrain is Misty Terrain and the user is grounded, this move's power is multiplied by 1.5. The user faints after using this move, even if this move fails for having no target. This move is prevented from executing if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.
shortDescJa: 使用後、自分は倒れる。ミストフィールド時1.5倍。
descJa: 使用後、自分はひんし状態になる。ミストフィールド時は威力が1.5倍になる。

name: Misty Terrain
shortDescEn: 5 turns. Can't status,-Dragon power vs grounded.
descEn: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Misty Terrain. During the effect, the power of Dragon-type attacks used against grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 0.5 and grounded Pokemon cannot be inflicted with a non-volatile status condition nor confusion. Grounded Pokemon can become affected by Yawn but cannot fall asleep from its effect. Camouflage transforms the user into a Fairy type, Nature Power becomes Moonblast, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to lower Special Attack by 1 stage. Fails if the current terrain is Misty Terrain.
shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、状態異常を防ぐ。
descJa: 5ターンの間、足がついているポケモンは状態異常と混乱を防ぎ、ドラゴン技の威力が0.5倍になる。

name: Moonblast
shortDescEn: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 10%で相手の特攻を1段階下げる。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手の特攻ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Moonlight
shortDescEn: Heals the user by a weather-dependent amount.
descEn: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP if Delta Stream or no weather conditions are in effect or if the user is holding Utility Umbrella, 2/3 of its maximum HP if the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, and 1/4 of its maximum HP if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow, all rounded half down.
shortDescJa: 天気に応じてHPを回復。
descJa: 天候に応じて最大HPの1/4〜2/3を回復する（デフォルトは1/2）。

name: Morning Sun
shortDescEn: Heals the user by a weather-dependent amount.
descEn: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP if Delta Stream or no weather conditions are in effect or if the user is holding Utility Umbrella, 2/3 of its maximum HP if the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, and 1/4 of its maximum HP if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow, all rounded half down.
shortDescJa: 天気に応じてHPを回復。
descJa: 天候に応じて最大HPの1/4〜2/3を回復する（デフォルトは1/2）。

name: Mortal Spin
shortDescEn: Poisons foes, frees user from hazards/bind/leech.
descEn: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the effects of Leech Seed and binding moves end for the user, and all hazards are removed from the user's side of the field. Has a 100% chance to poison the target.
shortDescJa: 相手を毒にし、自分は拘束や設置技を解除。
descJa: 相手を毒状態にする。自分にかかっている拘束、寄生種子、設置技を解除する。

name: Mountain Gale
shortDescEn: 30% chance to make the target flinch.
descEn: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
shortDescJa: 30%の確率で怯ませる。
descJa: 30%の確率で相手を怯ませる。

name: Muddy Water
shortDescEn: 30% chance to lower the foe(s) accuracy by 1.
descEn: Has a 30% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 30%で相手の命中率を1段階下げる。
descJa: 30%の確率で相手の命中率ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Mud Shot
shortDescEn: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 100%で相手の素早さを1段階下げる。
descJa: 100%の確率で相手の素早さランクを1段階下げる。

name: Mud-Slap
shortDescEn: 100% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 100%で相手の命中率を1段階下げる。
descJa: 100%の確率で相手の命中率ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Mystical Fire
shortDescEn: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 100%で相手の特攻を1段階下げる。
descJa: 100%の確率で相手の特攻ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Nasty Plot
shortDescEn: Raises the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
descEn: Raises the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.
shortDescJa: 自分の特攻を2段階上げる。
descJa: 自分の特攻ランクを2段階上げる。

name: Night Daze
shortDescEn: 40% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1.
descEn: Has a 40% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 40%で相手の命中率を1段階下げる。
descJa: 40%の確率で相手の命中率ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Night Shade
shortDescEn: Does damage equal to the user's level.
descEn: Deals damage to the target equal to the user's level.
shortDescJa: 自分のレベルと同じダメージを与える。
descJa: 自分のレベルと同じ値のダメージを与える。

name: Night Slash
shortDescEn: High critical hit ratio.
descEn: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
shortDescJa: 急所に当たりやすい。
descJa: 急所に当たりやすい。

name: Noble Roar
shortDescEn: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1.
descEn: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 相手の攻撃・特攻を1段階下げる。
descJa: 相手の攻撃・特攻ランクを1段階ずつ下げる。

name: Nuzzle
shortDescEn: 100% chance to paralyze the target.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.
shortDescJa: 100%の確率で麻痺にする。
descJa: 100%の確率で相手を「まひ」状態にする。

name: Outrage
shortDescEn: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
descEn: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.
shortDescJa: 2〜3ターン攻撃し、その後混乱。
descJa: 2〜3ターン連続で攻撃し、終了後に自分を混乱状態にする。

name: Overheat
shortDescEn: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
descEn: Lowers the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.
shortDescJa: 自分の特攻を2段階下げる。
descJa: 自分の特攻ランクを2段階下げる。

name: Pain Split
shortDescEn: Shares HP of user and target equally.
descEn: The user and the target's HP become the average of their current HP, rounded down, but not more than the maximum HP of either one.
shortDescJa: お互いのHPを足して半分にする。
descJa: お互いの残りHPを合計し、平均した値にする。

name: Parabolic Charge
shortDescEn: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
descEn: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.
shortDescJa: 与えたダメージの50%を回復。
descJa: 与えたダメージの1/2のHPを回復する。

name: Parting Shot
shortDescEn: Lowers target's Atk, Sp. Atk by 1. User switches.
descEn: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage. If this move is successful, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if the target's Attack and Special Attack stat stages were both unchanged, or if there are no unfainted party members.
shortDescJa: 相手の攻撃・特攻を下げ、交代する。
descJa: 相手の攻撃・特攻ランクを1段階下げてから交代する。

name: Payback
shortDescEn: Power doubles if the user moves after the target.
descEn: Power doubles if the user moves after the target this turn, including actions taken through Instruct or the Dancer Ability. Switching in does not count as an action.
shortDescJa: 後攻なら威力2倍。
descJa: 相手より後に行動すると威力が2倍になる。

name: Perish Song
shortDescEn: All active Pokemon will faint in 3 turns.
descEn: Each active Pokemon receives a perish count of 4 if it doesn't already have a perish count. At the end of each turn including the turn used, the perish count of all active Pokemon lowers by 1 and Pokemon faint if the number reaches 0. The perish count is removed from Pokemon that switch out. If a Pokemon uses Baton Pass while it has a perish count, the replacement will gain the perish count and continue to count down.
shortDescJa: 3ターン後に全員倒れる。
descJa: 3ターン後に場にいるポケモン全員がひんし状態になる。

name: Petal Blizzard
shortDescEn: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。全体攻撃。
descJa: 特に追加効果なし。周囲のポケモン全員を攻撃する。

name: Petal Dance
shortDescEn: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
descEn: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.
shortDescJa: 2〜3ターン攻撃し、その後混乱。
descJa: 2〜3ターン連続で攻撃し、終了後に自分を混乱状態にする。

name: Phantom Force
shortDescEn: Disappears turn 1. Hits turn 2. Breaks protection.
descEn: If this move is successful, it breaks through the target's Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, or Spiky Shield for this turn, allowing other Pokemon to attack the target normally. If the target's side is protected by Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard, that protection is also broken for this turn and other Pokemon may attack the target's side normally. This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
shortDescJa: 1ターン目に消え、2ターン目に攻撃。守り無効。
descJa: 1ターン目に姿を消し、2ターン目に攻撃する。相手の「まもる」状態を無効化する。

name: Pin Missile
shortDescEn: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
descEn: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
shortDescJa: 2〜5回連続攻撃。
descJa: 2〜5回連続で攻撃する（スキルリンクなら5回）。

name: Play Rough
shortDescEn: 10% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 10%で相手の攻撃を1段階下げる。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手の攻撃ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Pluck
shortDescEn: User steals and eats the target's Berry.
descEn: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held Berry if it is holding one and eats it immediately, gaining its effects even if the user's item is being ignored. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.
shortDescJa: 相手の木の実を奪って食べる。
descJa: 相手の持っている木の実を奪ってすぐ食べる。

name: Poison Fang
shortDescEn: 50% chance to badly poison the target.
descEn: Has a 50% chance to badly poison the target.
shortDescJa: 50%で相手を猛毒にする。
descJa: 50%の確率で相手を「もうどく」状態にする。

name: Poison Jab
shortDescEn: 30% chance to poison the target.
descEn: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.
shortDescJa: 30%で相手を毒にする。
descJa: 30%の確率で相手を「どく」状態にする。

name: Poison Powder
shortDescEn: Poisons the target.
descEn: Poisons the target.
shortDescJa: 相手を毒にする。
descJa: 相手を「どく」状態にする。

name: Pollen Puff
shortDescEn: If the target is an ally, heals 50% of its max HP.
descEn: If the target is an ally, this move restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded down, instead of dealing damage.
shortDescJa: 味方ならHPを50%回復。
descJa: 対象が味方なら最大HPの1/2を回復させる。

name: Poltergeist
shortDescEn: Fails if the target has no held item.
descEn: Fails if the target has no held item.
shortDescJa: 相手に持ち物がないと失敗。
descJa: 相手が持ち物を持っていないと失敗する。

name: Population Bomb
shortDescEn: Hits 10 times. Each hit can miss.
descEn: Hits ten times. This move checks accuracy for each hit, and the attack ends if the target avoids a hit. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit ten times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move hits four to ten times at random without checking accuracy between hits.
shortDescJa: 最大10回連続攻撃。
descJa: 最大10回連続で攻撃する（スキルリンクなら10回）。

name: Pounce
shortDescEn: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 100%で相手の素早さを1段階下げる。
descJa: 100%の確率で相手の素早さランクを1段階下げる。

name: Pound
shortDescEn: No additional effect.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

name: Power Gem
shortDescEn: No additional effect.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

name: Power Shift
shortDescEn: Switches user's Attack and Defense stats.
descEn: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats, and stat stage changes remain on their respective stats. This move can be used again to swap the stats back. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will have its Attack and Defense stats swapped if the effect is active. If the user has its stats recalculated by changing forme while its stats are swapped, this effect is ignored but is still active for the purposes of Baton Pass.
shortDescJa: 自分の攻撃と防御の数値を入れ替える。
descJa: 自分の攻撃と防御の値を入れ替える。

name: Power Split
shortDescEn: Averages Attack and Sp. Atk stats with target.
descEn: The user and the target have their Attack and Special Attack stats set to be equal to the average of the user and the target's Attack and Special Attack stats, respectively, rounded down. Stat stage changes are unaffected.
shortDescJa: 自分と相手の攻撃・特攻を平均化する。
descJa: 自分と相手の攻撃・特攻の値を合計して2で割った値にする。

name: Power Swap
shortDescEn: Swaps Attack and Sp. Atk stat stages with target.
descEn: The user swaps its Attack and Special Attack stat stage changes with the target.
shortDescJa: 自分と相手の攻撃・特攻ランクを入れ替える。
descJa: 自分の攻撃・特攻ランク変化を相手と入れ替える。

name: Power Trick
shortDescEn: Switches user's Attack and Defense stats.
descEn: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats, and stat stage changes remain on their respective stats. This move can be used again to swap the stats back. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will have its Attack and Defense stats swapped if the effect is active. If the user has its stats recalculated by changing forme while its stats are swapped, this effect is ignored but is still active for the purposes of Baton Pass.
shortDescJa: 自分の攻撃と防御の数値を入れ替える。
descJa: 自分の攻撃と防御の値を入れ替える。

name: Power Trip
shortDescEn: + 20 power for each of the user's stat boosts.
descEn: Power is equal to 20+(X*20), where X is the user's total stat stage changes that are greater than 0.
shortDescJa: 能力が上がるごとに威力+20。
descJa: 自分の能力ランクが上がるごとに威力が20ずつ加算される。

name: Power Whip
shortDescEn: No additional effect.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

name: Protect
shortDescEn: Prevents moves from affecting the user this turn.
descEn: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.
shortDescJa: このターンの相手の技を無効にする。
descJa: このターンの攻撃をすべて無効にする（連続使用で失敗しやすくなる）。

name: Psychic
shortDescEn: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 10%で相手の特防を1段階下げる。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手の特防ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Psychic Fangs
shortDescEn: Destroys screens, unless the target is immune.
descEn: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated.
shortDescJa: 壁を破壊する。
descJa: 攻撃前に相手の場の壁（リフレクター・光の壁・オーロラベール）を破壊する。

name: Psychic Noise
shortDescEn: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from healing.
descEn: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from restoring any HP as long as it remains active. During the effect, healing and draining moves are unusable, and Abilities and items that grant healing will not heal the user. If an affected Pokemon uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain unable to restore its HP. Pain Split and the Regenerator Ability are unaffected.
shortDescJa: 2ターンの間、回復できなくなる。
descJa: 2ターンの間、対象はHPを回復できなくなる。

name: Psychic Terrain
shortDescEn: 5 turns. Grounded: +Psychic power, priority-safe.
descEn: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Psychic Terrain. During the effect, the power of Psychic-type attacks made by grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 1.3 and grounded Pokemon cannot be hit by moves with priority greater than 0, unless the target is an ally. Camouflage transforms the user into a Psychic type, Nature Power becomes Psychic, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage. Fails if the current terrain is Psychic Terrain.
shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、先制技を無効化。
descJa: 5ターンの間、地面にいるポケモンは先制技を受けなくなり、エスパー技が強化される。

name: Psycho Cut
shortDescEn: High critical hit ratio.
descEn: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
shortDescJa: 急所に当たりやすい。
descJa: 急所に当たりやすい。

name: Psych Up
shortDescEn: Copies the target's current stat stages.
descEn: The user copies all of the target's current stat stage changes.
shortDescJa: 相手の能力変化をコピーする。
descJa: 相手の能力ランク変化をすべて自分のものにする。

name: Psyshield Bash
shortDescEn: 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 100%で自分の防御が1段階上がる。
descJa: 100%の確率で自分の防御ランクが1段階上がる。

name: Psyshock
shortDescEn: Damages target based on Defense, not Sp. Def.
descEn: Deals damage to the target based on its Defense instead of Special Defense.
shortDescJa: 相手の防御でダメージ計算。
descJa: 相手の防御ステータスを使ってダメージを計算する。

name: Quash
shortDescEn: Forces the target to move last this turn.
descEn: Causes the target to take its turn after all other Pokemon this turn, no matter the priority of its selected move. Fails if the target already moved this turn.
shortDescJa: 相手の行動を最後にする。
descJa: 対象をそのターンの最後に行動させる。

name: Quick Attack
shortDescEn: Usually goes first.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 先制攻撃を行う。
descJa: 優先度+1の先制技。

name: Quick Guard
shortDescEn: Protects allies from priority attacks this turn.
descEn: The user and its party members are protected from attacks with original or altered priority greater than 0 made by other Pokemon, including allies, during this turn. This move modifies the same 1/X chance of being successful used by other protection moves, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used, but does not use the chance to check for failure. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn or if this move is already in effect for the user's side.
shortDescJa: 味方への先制技を防ぐ。
descJa: そのターンの間、味方が受ける先制技をすべて防ぐ。

name: Quiver Dance
shortDescEn: Raises the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, Speed by 1.
descEn: Raises the user's Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 特攻・特防・素早さを1段階上げる。
descJa: 自分の特攻・特防・素早さランクを1段階ずつ上げる。

name: Rage Powder
shortDescEn: The foes' moves target the user on the turn used.
descEn: Until the end of the turn, all single-target attacks from the opposing side are redirected to the user. Such attacks are redirected to the user before they can be reflected by Magic Coat or the Magic Bounce Ability, or drawn in by the Lightning Rod or Storm Drain Abilities. Fails if it is not a Double Battle or Battle Royal. This effect is ignored while the user is under the effect of Sky Drop.
shortDescJa: 相手の技を自分に引き寄せる。
descJa: そのターンの間、相手の単体対象の技をすべて自分に向ける。

name: Raging Bull
shortDescEn: Destroys screens. Type depends on user's form.
descEn: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated. If the user's current form is a Paldean Tauros, this move's type changes to match. Fighting type for Combat Breed, Fire type for Blaze Breed, and Water type for Aqua Breed.
shortDescJa: 壁を破壊し、フォルムでタイプが変わる。
descJa: 攻撃前に壁を破壊する。パルデアケンタロスの場合はフォルムに応じてタイプが変わる。
